rationale: The Huang and Zhang (2011) paper is cited only in a grouped list of prior goal-pursuit studies when the authors broadly position their contribution. The citing paper does not engage its perceived-velocity theory, does not build hypotheses from that mechanism, and does not reuse its measures or methods. The core argument and analyses center on prosocial helping around crowdfunding goal attainment, so this specific citation serves as general background rather than a distinct functional input.
